name: simctl
fixHint: Install Xcode from the App Store, then: xcode-select --install and open Xcode once to accept the license

name: simulator-booted
run: xcrun simctl list devices | grep -q Booted
fixHint: Boot a simulator: open -a Simulator, or `xcrun simctl boot "iPhone 16"`

name: maestro
fixHint: Install Maestro: curl -fsSL https://get.maestro.mobile.dev | bash (then restart the shell)

name: metro-up
fixHint: Start the dev server: npm start -w apps/mobile (only needed during build phases)

name: accessibility-reminder
fixHint: Reminder (not auto-checkable): grant your terminal/IDE macOS Accessibility permission in System Settings > Privacy & Security > Accessibility, or simulator automation will silently fail
